reviews.review_description: There's nothing bad about this game I promise you you will get what you wanted in this gorilla tag fan game they have great staff none of them are toxic if they are report them to the discord please read the game five stars it really really helps out the game Make sure you change your name from gorilla and thank you for playing this game it really means a lot to me and everyone else that likes the game hopefully this game will get popular and recommended cuz that would mean a lot Love you all and hope you play the game

The game insane
 i like purgatory horror to
